escalation.rationale: Iran launched fresh missile waves at Israel while the US-Israel conflict enters day 26 with reports of joint targeting of Iranian leadership.

ticker_items: Iran fires new missile waves at Israel, 6 injured in Tel Aviv
Trump claims 'very good talks' with Iran; Tehran denies any negotiations
US-Israel war on Iran enters day 26 with escalating strikes
Strait of Hormuz remains closed, oil hits $100 in Europe
Reports suggest Netanyahu argued for joint killing of Khamenei

middle_east.description: Iranian missile strike on Tel Aviv injures 6 people and damages buildings and vehicles.
Iranian missiles and drones targeted multiple Gulf Arab states.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

middle_east.text: Iran launches a fresh wave of missiles at Israel Tuesday – and six people were left injured following a strike in Tel Aviv.
middle_east.speaker: News report
middle_east.title: Media coverage

middle_east.text: Now is the time for every citizen, enterprise and institution, including government, to make resilience an everyday part of how we think and act.
middle_east.speaker: General Sir Richard Barrons
middle_east.title: Former British military commander

observers.description: Irish investigation reveals Aughinish Alumina facility in Limerick has links to Russian military supply chains through aluminium trading networks. Government announces fuel relief package amid energy crisis.
Government weighing complex moral and legal questions about potential military involvement in defending the Strait of Hormuz. Analysts discuss how NZ could be drawn into the Iran war.

Intelligence experts assess Iranian 'sleeper cell' threats as rhetoric spikes since US-Israel war began. Over 125,000 Syrians fleeing Israeli strikes in Lebanon return home via Canadian-monitored border crossings.

financial.notes: Oil reached $100 in Europe while gas hit €54 amid Strait of Hormuz closure and escalating Middle East conflict.

update_log.text: Iran launches fresh wave of missiles at Israel, 6 injured in Tel Aviv attack.
Trump claims 'very good talks' with Iran while Tehran denies any negotiations taking place.
Reports suggest Netanyahu argued for joint US-Israeli operation to kill Khamenei.
Iran appoints Mohammad Zolghadr as new security chief amid external pressures.
